prompt: Create a vertical dark fantasy anime poster portrait in a 9:16 aspect ratio, extreme close-up of PONYO, a young androgynous character with pale skin, intense amber eyes, messy black hair falling across the face, and a serious, brooding expression. The face is partially covered by an elaborate metallic bird-like helmet and feathered armor made of layered gold-bronze plates, shaped like overlapping feathers and raven beaks. Include exactly 2 visible human eyes: one central amber eye under the hair and one smaller amber eye near the right edge; add exactly 1 glowing red jewel-like eye embedded in the bird helmet above the character’s right eye. Add exactly 1 small bird skull or beak ornament near the lower foreground as part of the armor. Use dramatic warm lighting with molten orange highlights, glowing embers, glossy reflections, and deep black shadows, creating a cinematic chiaroscuro effect. The composition should crop tightly around the face, helmet, and shoulder armor, with the character looking directly at the viewer from beneath the bird mask. Render in highly detailed painterly anime concept-art style with intricate texture, scratched metal, feather details, sharp beak shapes, and a mysterious ominous mood. At the bottom center, place the title text PONYO in a glowing pale-gold gothic fantasy font with sharp angular serifs, partially illuminated by orange light. No extra text, no watermark, no border.
